codeReview.summary: ContextCondensation implementation is correct and complete. The feature implements context condensation at 75% window utilization with auto-compact to prevent overflow. The implementation includes ContextWindow config (max_tokens: 100_000, warning_threshold: 0.65, condensation_threshold: 0.75), needs_condensation() method returning CondensationLevel enum, condense() method with priority-based item preservation, and utilization() calculation. All 3 unit tests pass.
codeReview.verdict: Implementation is correct. The prior blocking issue was a handoff accuracy problem (worker claimed implementation but ContextCondensation was pre-existing from commit 3a8c017). This was subsequently documented in fix-context-condensation-impl handoff which explicitly states: 'Previous scrutiny review identified process issue (wrong commit claimed) not implementation issue - implementation was correct from original skeleton commit.'

addressesFailureFrom: .factory/validation/agents/scrutiny/reviews/agents-context-condensation.json (prior review found worker claimed implementation of pre-existing code via handoff commitId 8ad9098 which was actually RefactorerAgent enhancement)
